message:
chore: remove dead code and unimplemented updater stubs

Core Registry Removal (src/core/):
- Delete src/core/registry.rs - contained only empty stub implementations
  - Registry::get() always returned Ok(None)
  - Registry::list() always returned Ok(vec![])
  - No actual functionality, just TODO placeholders
- Remove 'pub mod registry' from src/core/mod.rs
- The actual skill registry lives in src/meta_skills/registry.rs which
  has full implementation; this was a duplicate/abandoned stub

Updater Stubs Removal (src/updater/):
- Delete src/updater/check.rs:
  - check_updates() always returned Ok(None)
  - UpdateInfo struct was defined but never populated
- Delete src/updater/download.rs:
  - download() always returned Err(NotImplemented)
  - No actual download logic
- Delete src/updater/verify.rs:
  - verify() always returned Ok(false)
  - No actual SHA256 verification logic

These files were placeholders for a self-update feature that was never
implemented. The update command exists but delegates to system package
managers or manual download rather than these stubs. Removing them:
- Reduces confusion about what's implemented vs planned
- Eliminates dead code from the build
- Makes clear that self-update is not currently supported

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +0,0 @@
-//! Version checking
-
-use crate::error::Result;
-
-/// Check for available updates
-pub fn check_updates() -> Result<Option<UpdateInfo>> {
-    // TODO: Check GitHub releases
-    Ok(None)
-}
-
-/// Information about an available update
-#[derive(Debug)]
-pub struct UpdateInfo {
-    pub version: String,
-    pub url: String,
-    pub changelog: Option<String>,
-}

@@ -1,10 +0,0 @@
-//! Binary download
-
-use crate::error::{MsError, Result};
-
-/// Download update binary
-pub fn download(_url: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>> {
-    Err(MsError::NotImplemented(
-        "binary download is not implemented yet".to_string(),
-    ))
-}
